headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher After Analysts Lift Targets
summary: Caterpillar’s fair value estimate has been revised higher from US$913.29 to US$970.37, signaling a modest uplift in the modeled price target for the stock. This shift aligns with a recent cluster of upward target moves, as analysts balance strong demand signals in construction, energy, data centers, and infrastructure against debate over how much optimism is already reflected in Caterpillar shares. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how to track it as new data...

headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Overweight on Truist Financial, Lowers Price Target to $57
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Andrew Terrell   maintains Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $59 to $57.

headline: Truist Financial: Deep Value Based On Fee Growth (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Truist Financial delivered strong Q2 results, with double-digit growth in net earnings as well as non-interest income. Learn why TFC stock is upgraded to a buy.
